## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss preparation for GrowthX's content strategy kickoff with Create, a newly funded no-code app development platform.](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Create recently closed a $10M Series A and aims to reach $40M run rate by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [GrowthX to start content strategy on Sept 29th; Dhruv (CEO) will be main point of contact initially](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Create differentiates with native mobile apps, custom designs, and all-in-one platform for non-technical "dev-adjacent" builders](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Pre-kickoff prep: Dhruv to compile brand/audience info; GrowthX team to get Create account access](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

## Topics

### Create's Product and Vision

  - [World's best agent for building products without coding](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Aiming to be the "Shopify" of no-code app development](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Target: Millions of revenue-generating app businesses built on Create](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Key differentiators:](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
    1.  Native mobile + web apps in same project
    2.  Custom-looking designs (not generic AI-generated)
    3.  All-in-one platform (database, auth, payments, etc.)

### Target Audience

  - ["Dev-adjacent builders": Tech-savvy but not full developers](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Examples: Film producer, real estate agent building AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Often from tech-adjacent roles: designers, PMs, marketers, sales, IT, ops](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Understand app concepts but not deep technical jargon](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Full-funnel content: Educational top-funnel to comparison bottom-funnel](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic content (e.g., prompt library)](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Balance technical accuracy with approachability in tone](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Explore adjacent topics (e.g., mobile app development glossary)](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Dhruv to be hands-on initially, then transition to Zarya (marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide list of helpful pre-kickoff materials](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Weekly calls and Slack communication for ongoing alignment](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Erik to compile list of helpful pre-kickoff materials for Dhruv](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Dhruv to create brand voice examples and share with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Tyler and Erik to get Create account access for firsthand experience](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Prepare for kickoff on September 29th](https://fathom.video/share/C5yggbponaf8_cUV9FkhYfgxzrwhy2mb?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
